creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
I'm afraid that this is misleading, as the update itself addresses nothing from a ports point of view. It merely pins a sufficiently recent py-twisted version in synapse's poetry.lock file. This file only matters when poetry is used to create a venv, which the port does not do. The correct (and only) way to address this issue is by updating the py-twisted port, I'm afraid.

I'm not sure if an issue for the twisted port has already been filed, but the port itself seems to be outdated and most likely vulnerable. I'd suggest closing/renaming this issue and opening an issue against py-twisted so that this vulnerability can be addressed properly.
